summary: Tested all 7 features from the WellTrack MTSS Platform iteration. All features working correctly. No critical issues found.
seed_data_creation: DB freshly seeded: 32 students, 40 interventions (21 active + 19 completed), 25 alerts (low_attendance_80: 6, low_attendance_90: 2, tier_change: 10, high_risk_saebrs: 7), 55 school days Feb-May 2025
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working. Analytics Overview shows Tier1:11, Tier2:9, Tier3:12 correctly. Cohort Comparison tab shows 4 year level / 4 class cards with tier distribution and attendance charts. Analytics Attendance tab shows 55 school days and monthly trend Feb-May 2025. Analytics Interventions tab shows 40 total (21 active, 19 completed) with charts. Students list shows preferred names (Ollie, Alex, Will, Ben). Branding color picker and save works. Session token in test_credentials still valid.
features_tested: Analytics Cohort Comparison tab: PASS - 4 year level cards (Year 3/5/7/9), 4 class cards (3A/5B/7C/9A), dropdown toggle works, tier distribution and avg attendance charts render
Analytics Overview tab: PASS - Tier Distribution pie chart shows Tier1:11, Tier2:9, Tier3:12 (no longer shows 0s), screened 32/32 = 100%
Analytics Attendance tab: PASS - Monthly trend shows Feb-May 2025, 55 school days, 8 chronic absentees, 4 critical absentees
Analytics Interventions tab: PASS - 40 total interventions, 21 active, 19 completed, charts visible
Students list preferred names: PASS - Shows 'Noah (Ollie) Anderson', 'Alexander (Alex) Young', 'William (Will) Walker', 'Benjamin (Ben) Hall'
Branding accent color: PASS - Color picker present, save works
Seed data: PASS - 32 students, 55 school days, low_attendance alerts auto-generated
